title: Claude 2026 Prompting and Claude Code Practice · Evaluation Brief: Claude Tool Steering
summary: Apply current Anthropic guidance to tool use, examples, context, and long-running coding. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt claude tool steering increment in a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Steer tool selection with descriptions and instructions, using enforced tool choice only when required.
Use diverse examples and structural tags when they improve task boundary recognition.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
